WAYFINDING PROOF · NORTH CONCOURSE

NORTH QUAY

DRAG ↔ WIDTH · ↕ WEIGHT

—READING SOURCE PIXELS

Drag inside the specimen to adjust width horizontally and weight vertically. Use arrow keys to tune, Enter to match the scene recommendation, Home or Escape to reset, or use the visible range controls.

Motion · human-owned font axes real concourse pixels → recommended axes → human-adjusted wayfinding proof
